MOSES-CRITICAL_FLAW_POWER.title: Critical Flaw
MOSES-CRITICAL_FLAW_POWER.description: Next attack deals 0 damage, take double damage. Remove after taking damage or attack.

MOSES-DARK_BARRIER.title: Dark Barrier
MOSES-DARK_BARRIER.description: Blocked attack damage is reflected to your attacker this turn.
